Sheffield Shield, 2024-25: Victoria vs South Australia

summary: The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is currently live on Day 1, though play has been affected by rain. The AFC U20 Asian Cup 2025 concluded in March 2025. No matches were found for Chandigarh T20 today.
